other_observers: First seen on 12/12/2012 with Margie Joy, seen on other dates with Mark Peterson, and the last date on 01/03/2013 with Glenn Walbek and Loch Kilpatrick.; Margie Joy and I found them first. I believe a few other birders saw them over this time frame, including several people on 01/01/2013.
specific_location: North Picnic Road at Pueblo Reservoir
description: One to four birds present around North Picnic Road at Pueblo Reservoir from December 12, 2012 to January 3, 2013. Photos taken on January 3, 2012. See photos.Behaviors: Flying around and then landing on old sunflower heads.Call: jit jit, siskin like noisesPlumage: winter
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
